name: Indoorsman Golf Club
address: 9475 Double R Blvd ste 14, Reno, NV 89521
about: Indoorsman Golf Club is a new, private, members-only indoor golf facility in Reno, NV, offering 24/7 access to premium Trackman simulator technology in spacious, private bays. The club is designed for golfers seeking a dedicated, weather-independent environment for practice and play, utilizing the world-leading Trackman iO platform. Membership is required for access, with various tiers offering different booking windows and session lengths to accommodate different playing styles and schedules.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 key-coded access for private, uncrowded practice on your own schedule
Premium Trackman iO simulator technology with AI-driven swing analysis (Tracy)
Access to elite virtual courses like Montreux without high club initiation fees
A growing community with plans for member-only leagues and tournaments

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen or food service is mentioned.
No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service. BYOB status is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: World-leading radar and camera-based launch monitor with AI-powered swing analysis tool, Tracy.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, as a member, you must bring your own golf clubs to use in the private simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on bringing outside food or drinks. No on-site kitchen or bar is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes. Session lengths are limited by membership tier (2-3 hours max).

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No. Indoorsman GC is described as a members-only, private club focused on serious golf practice. It is not marketed as a family-friendly or kid-friendly environment.
